allow: Bash(pkill -f "target/debug/omwhisper" 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "vite" 2>/dev/null; sleep 2 && cargo tauri dev 2>&1 | grep -E "Finished|Running|^error\\[" | head -5)
Bash(pkill -f omwhisper 2>/dev/null; sleep 1 && cargo tauri dev 2>&1)
Bash(lsof -ti :5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "cargo run" 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "omwhisper" 2>/dev/null; echo "done")
Bash(lsof -ti :5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "target/debug/omwhisper" 2>/dev/null; sleep 2 && cargo tauri dev 2>&1)
Bash(lsof -ti :5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "cargo tauri dev" 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "omwhisper" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; echo "Processes killed")
